title: Ultra Ruby
description: This Mod adds Ruby armor, tools and more coll stuff like a ultra miner tool (3x3)
body:
This mod add Ruby to the game with new tools and new armor and a ultra miner(it´s a tool that mines a 3x3 area) Ruby is better then netherite an super rare

Needs Fabric API

Check out my YT (German): https://www.youtube.com/@Redcube0_0
